note: Haneda D-runway channel (owner-flagged severance). The runway is a pier-supported platform: OSM draws ~750 m of the real flow passage as LAND, which is why the auto mesh severed it while the goto2023 sample meshes it. arc_on_land_tol_m raised EXPLICITLY to accept crossing that pier-as-land stretch; lateral min_gap still protects the far-side bay water.
